name: Cherry Cookie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 12-inch pizza pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare the crust, combine margarine, egg whites, milk, and vanilla in a mixing bowl.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, granulated sugar, and baking powder.
5. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll dough into a 12-inch circle.
7. Transfer the rolled dough to the prepared pizza pan.
8. Bake for 7 minutes or until golden brown. Cool.
9. Meanwhile, to prepare the topping, combine powdered sugar and softened cream cheese.
10. Spread over the cooled cookie crust, leaving at least 1/2 inch from the edge.
11. Spoon cherry pie filling over the cream cheese layer.
Note: For a lighter crust, you can use whole wheat flour or add finely chopped nuts to the dough.
